---
title: "quarto-chevrons"
subtitle: "Circular diagram styles for Quarto"
toc: false
---

`quarto-chevrons` is a Quarto extension that adds a collection of circular diagram styles to your documents and Reveal.js presentations. Each style shares the same authoring model — a container div with nested `item` divs — but renders differently.

## Installation

```bash
quarto add EmilHvitfeldt/quarto-chevrons
```

Activate the extension in your document YAML:

```yaml
filters:
  - circle-flow
```

## Styles

::: {layout-ncol=2}

### [Circle Flow](circle-flow.qmd)

Nodes arranged on a ring, connected by arrows.

::: circle-flow
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
:::

### [Pie](pie.qmd)

Items rendered as equal-sized wedges of a circle.

::: pie
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
::: item
David
:::
::: item
Eve
:::
:::

:::

## Shared concepts

Across all styles:

- [Node Shapes](node-shapes.qmd) — circle, box, and text-only nodes
- [Arrow Types](arrow-types.qmd) — chevron, curved, thin, ring, arc, and double arrows
- [Colors](colors.qmd) — global and per-item color control
- [Customization](customization.qmd) — full class and attribute reference
